page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: LASC250, HIST250, OR LACS250.

Formerly: LASC250.

HIST251 Latin America Since Independence (3 Credits)

Introductory survey of the history of Latin America from the era

of independence (c. 1810-1825) through the early 1980s. Major

themes include independence and sovereignty, postcolonialism and neocolonialism, nation- and state-building, liberalism, citizenship, economic development and modernization, social organization and stratification, race and ethnicity, gender relations, identity politics, reform and revolution, authoritarianism and democratization, and inter-American relations.

Cross-listed with: LACS251.
